readme:
# shadcn/ui

A set of beautifully designed components that you can customize, extend, and build on. Start here then make it your own. Open Source. Open Code. **Use this to build your own component library**.

![hero](apps/v4/public/opengraph-image.png)

## Documentation

Visit https://ui.shadcn.com/docs to view the documentation.

## Contributing

Please read the [contributing guide](/CONTRIBUTING.md).

## License

Licensed under the [MIT license](./LICENSE.md).

prs.body: Updates pnpm to 10.33.4, aligns GitHub workflow pnpm pins, and sets pnpm minimumReleaseAge to 2880 minutes.
prs.title: Update pnpm release age settings

prs.body:
## Summary

  Adds `@gymnopedies` to `apps/v4/registry/directory.json`.

  Gymnopédies is a dark, serif, glow-leaning shadcn registry of read-only components for blogs, essays, and long-form reading experiences — inspired by the quiet, candlelit cabaret of Erik Satie's
  *Gymnopédies*.

  - **Homepage**: https://gymnopedies.shoota.work
  - **Registry endpoint**: https://gymnopedies.shoota.work/r/gymnopedies.json
  - **Source**: https://github.com/shoota/gymnopedies

  ## What's inside

  - **Theme** — dark, serif (Merriweather), glow-leaning tokens
  - **35 non-form shadcn primitives** (built on `@base-ui/react`, `base-nova` style)
  - **5 bespoke blog primitives** — `hero`, `picture`, `content`, `date-time`, `header-navigation`
  - **1 hook** — `use-mobile`
  - **Preset** — `gymnopedies.json` installs the whole set in one command

  Forms are intentionally out of scope — gymnopédies is a read-only design system for reading experiences.

  ## Verification

  - [x] `registry.json` conforms to the shadcn registry schema
  - [x] All items publicly accessible at `https://gymnopedies.shoota.work/r/{name}.json`
  - [x] Each item declares `author` and `categories` metadata
  - [x] Logo SVG main shape uses `var(--foreground)` for theme adaptation
  - [x] Entry inserted alphabetically between `@glasscn` and `@ha-components`

  ## Try it

  ```bash
  npx shadcn@latest add https://gymnopedies.shoota.work/r/gymnopedies.json
  ```
prs.title: feat(registry): add @gymnopedies registry

prs.body:
Bug fix: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/issues/10726

The issue was that DirectoryList wasn’t wrapped in Suspense. For now, I just wrapped it inside the DirectoryList component itself, but I think there’s no need for useMounted anymore since the Skeleton is now shown via the Suspense fallback. I haven’t removed it yet, though
prs.title: Fix direct navigation to /docs/directory

prs.body:
This PR was opened by the [Changesets release](https://github.com/changesets/action) GitHub action. When you're ready to do a release, you can merge this and the packages will be published to npm automatically. If you're not ready to do a release yet, that's fine, whenever you add more changesets to main, this PR will be updated.


# Releases
## shadcn@4.8.0

### Minor Changes

-   [#10715](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/pull/10715) [`51e3cfaf32faeff2589e5c74d81ffd109f509e93`](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/commit/51e3cfaf32faeff2589e5c74d81ffd109f509e93) Thanks [@shadcn](https://github.com/shadcn)! - add shadcn registry validate command

-   [#10708](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/pull/10708) [`c8ab3801ecf97c0350ac0234a25e61f19ccaba62`](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/commit/c8ab3801ecf97c0350ac0234a25e61f19ccaba62) Thanks [@shadcn](https://github.com/shadcn)! - add include to registry.json

### Patch Changes

-   [#10567](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/pull/10567) [`1c4a53a37adeba36dbd5c07980c5bb6d295cea9e`](https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/commit/1c4a53a37adeba36dbd5c07980c5bb6d295cea9e) Thanks [@shadcn](https://github.com/shadcn)! - fix failing version derivation test
prs.title: chore(release): version packages

prs.body:
## New Registry: @next-ui

- **Homepage:** https://nexus-ui.com
- **Registry URL:** https://nexus-ui.com/r/{name}.json
- **Registry index:** https://nexus-ui.com/registry.json
- **Components:** 57 motion-native components for Next.js

### Checklist
- [x] registry.json live at https://nexus-ui.com/registry.json
- [x] Component files live at https://nexus-ui.com/r/{name}.json
- [x] Open source
- [x] Works with shadcn CLI
prs.title: feat: add @next-ui registry

prs.body: ## Summary Adds [Bklit UI](https://ui.bklit.com) to the open source registry index so users can install chart components via the shadcn CLI: - `shadcn add @bklit-ui/` - `shadcn search @bklit-ui` Registry: https://ui.bklit.com/r/registry.json ## Test plan - [x] `pnpm validate:registries` passes in `apps/v4` - [ ] Registry is publicly accessible at `https://ui.bklit.com/r/registry.json` - [ ] After merge, `npx shadcn@latest add @bklit-ui/line-chart` resolves the registry automatically ## Visual test Confirmation Bklit logo looks correct in light & dark modes on `/docs/directory` route. Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
prs.title: feat(registry): add @bklit registry

prs.body: Adds a [Formisch](https://formisch.dev/) guide to the Forms docs, alongside the existing React Hook Form and TanStack Form pages, so users can see how to wire up Formisch with shadcn components.
prs.title: feat: add Formisch (form library) examples to docs

prs.body:
Added @trophy-ui registry

[ui.trophy.so](https://ui.trophy.so)

Checklist
- [x] The registry must be open source and publicly accessible.
- [x] The registry must be a valid JSON file that conforms to the [registry schema specification](https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/registry/registry-json).
- [x] The registry is expected to be a flat registry with no nested items i.e /registry.json and /component-name.json files are expected to be in the root of the registry.
- [x] The files array, if present, must NOT include a content property.
prs.title: feat: add @trophy-ui registry
